creator: bsd@bontempi.net
text:
I see other ports are affected, all seems related to "libharfbuzz.so.0" not found.

Could it the "Split off the harfbuzz icu support into it's own port." recent change?

Anyway, it seems not specific to LibreOffice per se, so, feel free to close this ticket.

[Note to self: always use beadm before *any* update]
